content:
Edmonton Squash Club Basic Legacy Membership

Can I purchase a Basic Legacy Membership?

No, the Basic Legacy membership is no longer available for purchase, and only existing Basic members are able to have it. If current members cancel their Basic Legacy membership, they will no longer be able to repurchase it.

What club benefits do you get?

-Fob Access 5 AM – Midnight
-Fitness Equipment Access 365 days of the year
-Steam Room
-Sweat Towels & Shower Towels
-Footworker access
-Doubles Court Booking Privileges
-Doubles Drop-ins
-Reduced Guest Fees ($15 + GST for doubles or off-peak singles, $20 for peak hours)
-PlaySight camera access
-Off-Peak Singles Court Booking Privileges
-Unlimited Singles Drop-ins
-Complimentary Family Jr memberships for all U16 household children
-Peak Hours Singles Court Booking Privileges
-The maximum number of bookings of any type allowed in a month is 4, and any days played (other than scheduled drop-ins) require a drop-in fee

What is prime-time?

During the week, prime time is 4:30 PM – 9:00 PM. On weekends, prime-time is 10:30 AM – 3:00 PM.

What are your booking privileges?

Online Booking is available by logging into Club Locker from our “Book A Court” button. Bookings can also be made by emailing the front desk at info@edmontonsquashclub.ca.

Basic Legacy members can book courts up to 1 week in advance.

Basic Legacy members can book one court/day up to a maximum of 4 bookings/month. You are not permitted to play on the singles courts on days that you don’t have a booking other than scheduled drop-ins. Additional bookings must be arranged through the front desk, and will require a drop-in fee.

Courts during non-prime time can be booked with one member name + either the Solo Court Booking profile or leaving it as an Open Booking.

Courts during prime time can be booked using the Open Booking for the second name until 48 hours prior to the court booking, at which point they will be removed from the system by the front desk unless a second name is attached.

Booking can be cancelled online 4 hours in advance. Within 4 hours of the court time, courts can only be cancelled by emailing info@edmontonsquashclub.ca. Cancellations by phone cannot be guaranteed as our staffing levels are not sufficient to ensure that phone calls will be answered or returned in a timely manner. Chronic last hour cancellation of courts may result in restriction of booking privileges at the sole discretion of ESC management.

What is the cost?

A Legacy Basic membership costs $49/month.

How to register

Just send us an email at info@edmontonsquashclub.ca, call us at 780-306-2395 or come and visit us during staff hours, and we will get you all set up. Make sure you let us know which membership type you’re interested in so we can get you started.
